generated_oml:
instance ThermalIncubatorEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains StyrofoamBox, HeatBedActuator, CoolingFanActuator, ThermalIncubatorTemperatureSensor, RaspberryPi4
]

instance StyrofoamBox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulation box structure of thermal incubator"
]

instance HeatBedActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heating element actuator for precise temperature control in thermal incubator"
]

instance CoolingFanActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Fan actuator for cooling and air circulation in thermal incubator"
]

instance ThermalIncubatorTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor used in thermal incubator system for environmental monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance RaspberryPi4 : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B used as physical controller for thermal incubator system"
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ThermalIncubatorTemperatureSensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data collected from thermal incubator sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyOptimization, RabbitMQ
]

instance ThermalIncubatorCADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric model of thermal incubator using Computer-Aided Design (CAD) for structural dimensions"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyOptimization, RabbitMQ
]

instance ThermalIncubatorDynamicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical model described by differential equations for thermal dynamics of incubator"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyOptimization, RabbitMQ
]

instance ThermalIncubatorCyberModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Cyber model integrating physical and digital aspects of the thermal incubator system"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyOptimization, RabbitMQ
]

instance RabbitMQ : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Message-oriented communication middleware for data exchange between Digital Twin components"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, SimulationService
]

instance ScipyOptimization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy package used for optimization algorithms in Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

instance GitHubVersionControl : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "GitHub repository for version control of hardware specifications and software code"
    DTDFVocab:enables SoftwareDevelopmentService
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation service to reproduce and predict thermal behavior of physical incubator"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveAnalysisInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring service for safety and optimal operation using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight, SupervisoryControlInsight, CorrectiveAction
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization service for heating elements using fault detectors and optimisers"
    DTDFVocab:provides StateEstimationInsight, OptimizationInsight
]

instance SoftwareDevelopmentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for managing version control and code development of Digital Twin components"
    DTDFVocab:provides VersionControlInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analysis of thermal behavior under current operating conditions"
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of faults in thermal incubator system using sensor data"
]

instance SupervisoryControlInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Supervisory control decisions for system regulation"
]

instance StateEstimationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimation of current system state using sensor data and models"
]

instance OptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized parameters for heating elements based on system performance"
]

instance CorrectiveAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Corrective action triggered by safety violations in thermal incubator system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance VersionControlInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Version control status and history of Digital Twin components"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The controller on the Raspberry Pi listens to the RabbitMQ server for commands controlling the fan and heatbed; the low-level driver incorporates a safe protocol to validate command integrity before execution."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin employs calibration algorithms to update models of the cyber-physical system and environment with the best estimate of parameters, uses the resulting data to inform monitors checking for safe and optimal performance, and triggers human or algorithmic interventions upon detecting violations to adjust the physical twin."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The system employs a RabbitMQ server running on the Raspberry Pi for message brokering, with sensors connected via a 1-Wire bus supporting multiple DS18S20 devices."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Monitors within the Digital Twin check for safe and optimal system performance; upon violation detection, humans or algorithms initiate changes to the Physical Twin."
]
